# Nyamuk MQTT Manager

*The friendly mosquito for your MQTT broker*

## Description

Mosquitto MQTT Manager with TUI & Web Dashboard - configure, monitor, and manage your IoT infrastructure without coding.

## Features

- TUI Dashboard for terminal access
- Web Dashboard for browser monitoring
- CLI interface for automation
- User management
- ACL management
- Real-time monitoring
- ESP32 templates

## Quick Start

```bash
# Install
pip install -e .

# Run TUI
nyamuk tui

# Run Web Dashboard
nyamuk web --port 8080
```
